title: The 5 skills residency program directors expect on day one
citation: American Medical Association. The 5 skills residency program directors expect on day one. Mar 18, 2026. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Competency framing for exam scenario design, workflow-readiness testing, and day-one residency readiness hypotheses.
claims_supported: The article lists five residency day-one skills: gather history/physical, oral summary, documentation, interprofessional team participation, and recognition/initial management of urgent or emergent care.
The article highlights time management, prioritization, and organizing work as transition pain points.
claims_not_supported: That XR simulation improves those skills.
That OpenClinXR has validated resident-readiness outcomes.
